name: Lessons Learned Documentation
description: Automates the lessons learned process after an incident is resolved. A code node collects the full investigation timeline, response actions, and outcome metrics (MTTD, MTTR). Riggs AI generates a comprehensive lessons learned report identifying what worked well, what needs improvement, and specific recommendations for detection rule tuning, process updates, and training gaps. The report goes through IR lead approval, then a survey link is distributed to all responders for additional input. The final report is filed in Jira and shared with the security team via Slack.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create lessons learned report ticket and track improvement action items

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Distribute responder survey and share final lessons learned report

config.description: Manually triggered after an incident is resolved to initiate the lessons learned documentation process

config.query: SELECT al.timestamp, al.action, al.actor, al.details, al.duration_minutes FROM audit_log al WHERE al.investigation_id = '{{trigger_1.investigation_id}}' ORDER BY al.timestamp ASC
config.description: Collect the full investigation timeline, all response actions, responder participation, and timing metrics

config.additional_instructions: Generate a lessons learned report covering: 1) Incident timeline summary, 2) What worked well, 3) What needs improvement, 4) Detection gaps identified, 5) Response process bottlenecks, 6) Recommendations for detection rule tuning, process updates, and training. Calculate MTTD and MTTR from the timeline data.
config.description: AI-powered lessons learned report generation with actionable improvement recommendations
IR lead reviews the lessons learned report for accuracy before distribution to responders

notify.message:
LESSONS LEARNED — RESPONDER SURVEY

Incident: {{trigger_1.investigation_title}}

The lessons learned report has been drafted and approved. Please provide your feedback:

Survey Link: {{config.survey_base_url}}/lessons-learned/{{trigger_1.investigation_id}}

Your input helps us improve our detection and response capabilities. Please complete the survey within 5 business days.

Key areas to reflect on:
- Were you notified in time?
- Did you have the right tools and access?
- What would you do differently?

config.description: Distribute the responder feedback survey to all participants for additional lessons learned input
Create a Jira ticket to formally track the lessons learned report and improvement action items
Share the published lessons learned report with the broader security team on Slack
Lessons learned process complete — report approved, survey distributed, filed in Jira, and shared with security team
